description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, creating a striped pattern. The grooves are deep and dark, contrasting with the lighter, speckled stone material that forms the raised sections. The block has a solid, robust appearance, with clean, straight edges and a uniform thickness. The sides of the block are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, utilitarian design. The overall look suggests durability and resistance to wear, suitable for high-traffic urban environments. The absence of visible fasteners or decorative elements indicates a focus on practicality and structural integrity.
description: A rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on top, creating a striped pattern. The block is solid, robust, and utilitarian, with smooth sides and a speckled stone finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stone block's striped top surface with grooves running horizontally and the solid, smooth front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and regular spacing of the grooves, with the stripes running vertically from this perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped top surface and the block's solid, unadorned back face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the vertical grooves and the block's uniform thickness.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a tactile paving or barrier element
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no chips or discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: aligned flush with adjacent pavement or blocks
